name: Master Mix Calculator
description: Calculates scaled reagent volumes for PCR and lab protocols. Automatically applies a 10% dead volume buffer to account for pipetting loss and rounds results to one decimal place.

inputs.name: protocol_name
inputs.description: The name of the protocol to use (e.g., 'general_pcr', 'tissue_specific_pcr') as defined in the recipes database.

inputs.name: num_samples
inputs.description: The actual number of experimental reactions planned by the user.

outputs.description: The complete calculation results including scaled volumes and protocol instructions.

Scaled Recipe.description: A dictionary of reagents and their scaled total volumes.
